details: Notify-utilities@1.3.5 is a trojanized clone of the pino logger. On require(), index.js spawns lib/vcall.js as a detached background process. vcall.js fetches a payload from hxxps://api[.]jsonsilo[.]com/public/df71fd55-4f0c-4326-9b5b-a285e38023a5 and executes it via the Function constructor, giving the remote payload full access to Node.js require(). The package name combosquats the real pino/notify ecosystem. Package is a trojanized clone of the pino logger. When required by an application, index.js spawns a detached background Node.js process (lib/vcall.js) that fetches arbitrary JavaScript code from hxxps://api[.]jsonsilo[.]com/public/df71fd55-4f0c-4326-9b5b-a285e38023a5 and executes it via the Function constructor with access to require(), enabling the remote server to deliver any second-stage payload at will. The package ships a.env file referencing hxxp://vercel-five-coral[.]vercel[.]app/ as a development endpoint.
